news:
[b]Welcome to the Early Access of SpaceSlog![/b]

Please note that this game is still under development, and you may encounter bugs or other issues. If you come across any bugs or have suggestions, please visit our [color=ORANGE][url={forums_link}]forums[/url][/color] or [color=ORANGE][url={discord_link}]Discord[/url][/color].

Features are still being added and refined, so what you're playing now is not fully representative of the final version of the game.

If you have any questions or feedback, please don't hesitate to reach out via the forums or Discord using the links above.

Thank you, and enjoy the game!

Marcus 'Produno' Crane
Produno Games Studios
demo_news:
[b]Welcome to the demo of SpaceSlog! (This demo features 12 in game days of the main game.)[/b]

Please note that the game is still in its early stages, and many bugs or issues may still be present. If you find any bugs or have any suggestions, please visit our [color=ORANGE][url={forums_link}]forums[/url][/color] or [color=ORANGE][url={discord_link}]Discord[/url][/color].

Several features have been omitted from this demo build to give players a small taste of what the game has to offer. What you are currently playing is not representative of the final completed product.

If you have any questions or feedback, please head over to our forums or Discord using the links above.

Thanks and have fun!

Marcus 'Produno' Crane
Produno Games Studios
